---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?
     Write from the user's perspective: "As a [role], I want to [goal] so that [reason]." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe your ideal solution clearly. Include mockups, diagrams, or
     examples if it helps. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why did you rule them out? -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- How will we know this feature is done? Be specific. -->
- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Impact
- [ ] Breaking change (requires migration or deprecation)
- [ ] New dependency introduced
- [ ] Affects performance
- [ ] Requires infrastructure change
- [ ] None of the above

## Priority (from your perspective)
- [ ] Must have
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Future consideration

## Additional Context
<!-- Links to similar implementations, prior art, Slack threads, etc. -->
